sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95548" key="smu/rnisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σμύρν-ῐσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95548.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">embalming with myrrh</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:143" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.143</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">153</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
